settings.title: H3 Dual-mode Hydraulic Handbrake
settings.subtitle: Drift or Rally? All played well!
settings.description:
Specifically designed for drivers who delve deep into sim-racing drifts and rallies. 

Equipped with patented technology and advanced craftsmanship, it partners with you to conquer the roads of racing with joy.

settings.title: Upgraded CONSPIT Hydraulic System
settings.description:
Featuring an upgraded hydraulic system design, significantly enhancing damping for exceptional smoothness.

Extended piston and precision-machined hydraulic cylinder surface improve sealing performance, while high-performance elastomers ensure durability for prolonged use.

settings.title: Precise Input
settings.description: Equipped with a 5Mpa high-precision hydraulic sensor, the H3 Handbrake is capable of sensing the slightest driving inputs, ensuring precise control over rear wheel slip.

settings.title: Precision Engineering & Performance
settings.description:
Race-grade engineered design with precision-machined construction ensures durability, zero mechanical free play, and consistent feedback.

An optimized surface treatment enhances coating density and longevity.

settings.title: Adjustable Preload
settings.description: he adjustment knob allows precise tuning of preload, altering the initial tension and resistance on the lever to suit your preference.

settings.title: Mechanical Advancements
settings.description: Precision-machined parts with a high-spec sealed bearing design ensure dust resistance for moving components, ensuring long-term durability.

settings.title: Four-level Strength Adjustment
settings.description:
Equipped with a four-level strength adjustment function, allowing users to freely switch between preferred force settings by quickly adjusting the pin position.

With a 2x force difference between Position 1 and Position 4, the handbrake offers a wide adjustment range for a personalized driving experience.

settings.title: CONSPIT Aesthetic Style
settings.description: Distinctive racing-industrial aesthetic language, offering a blend of mechanical functionality and visual appeal.
